title: Non-record: MTP Auxiliary Loss Exploration
author: genji0306

data.description: Enable the existing Multi-Token Prediction (MTP) auxiliary loss path during training while discarding the MTP heads at export, so it does not affect artifact size.

novel_contributions: Exploration of Multi-Token Prediction as an auxiliary training loss
Uses an existing disabled MTP code path in train_gpt.py
Claims zero impact on the 16MB artifact constraint because MTP heads are excluded from export
No code changes required; only environment variable configuration
